title: Opinion: Opinion | Panic In Silicon Valley: Why 15,000 Indians Fled US Last Year - With More On Their Way
summary_full: More than 15,000 Indian tech professionals returned home from the US in 2025, and 7,300 have already returned this year, driven by layoffs, visa denials, and a job market that's fast becoming a nightmare.
summary_public: More than 15,000 Indian tech professionals returned home from the US in 2025, and 7,300 have already returned this year, driven by layoffs, visa denials, and a job market that's fast becoming a nightmare.
